source.description: Filter by source label written by the sidecar (e.g. 'github', 'slurm-callback', 'vendor-x'). Exact match.

event_type.description: Filter by event_type (source-specific, e.g. 'push', 'job.completed'). Exact match.

ack_status.description: Filter by ack_status. Default 'pending' shows only unconsumed rows.

since.description: Unix epoch seconds. Filter to rows with received_at >= since.

limit.description: Max rows to return. Newest-first ordering.
